notes: apply_diff_model.rs: 'File exceeds...', 'File is binary', 'Not found', 'Unknown error' all flow into FileReadResult::ReadError -> safe_warn! telemetry + DiffApplicationError::ReadFailed whose Display discards the message ({ file, .. } -> 'Could not read {file}'); never UI-rendered -> telemetry_payload. suggested_rule_modal.rs: ActionButton labels 'Add rule'/'Edit rule' and offline tooltip 'Editing is disabled while offline.' are UI -> translate. rule.rs: ' anytime.' (DISABLED_BANNER_TEXT_2), 'turn it back on' (link text), 'Initialize Project' button, ZERO_STATE_TEXT_PROJECT, 'Project based' tab label -> UI translate. code/view.rs: 'Failed to load file.'/'Failed to save file.'/'File saved.' are DismissibleToast text; 'Close saved' is a MenuItem label -> translate. queue.rs: 'Client id entry should exist'/'Server id entry should exist'/'Expect id' are .expect() panic strings -> panic_message. get_started_view.rs: paragraphs 'Welcome to Warp', 'The Agentic Development Environment', and ' New session in {}  {}' (placeholders=home dir + keybinding, kept double-space + leading space) are onboarding UI -> translate. search_item.rs: DiffSetSearchItem name/description shown in AI context menu -> translate; {branch} preserved; 'main' kept as literal branch name. renderer.rs: ' window '/' windows'/' tab '/' tabs' are pill suffixes appended to a numeric count in launch-config description; preserved leading/trailing space, rendered as '<n> 个窗口/个标签页'. search_bar.rs: 'Loading {} suggestions'/'Error finding results'/'Selected {}' are AccessibilityContent (screen-reader UI) -> translate, placeholders preserved. data_source.rs: '{}% off!' discount chip, 'Manage' button, '{display_name} is not available for free users. ' (trailing space preserved, followed by 'Upgrade' hyperlink), 'Model: {}' a11y label -> translate. settings.rs: five description: fields shown in settings UI -> translate. ssh_file_upload.rs: 'Waiting for password input'/'Failed to upload' status text, 'File Uploads' header -> translate; 'SSH File Upload' is fn ui_name() used only as keymap::Context identifier (id! / context.set.insert) -> protocol_key. codebase_index.rs: lines 403/404/1910/1911 flow into safe_error! safe/full logging -> telemetry_payload; 'Should be syncing' is .expect() -> panic_message. assertions.rs: all four strings live in safe_assert!/safe_assert_eq! macro bodies that combine debug_assert! with log::error! diagnostics -> panic_message (debug_assert family per policy 10). shell/mod.rs: '- cmd: ' is a fish-history YAML line prefix used in strip_prefix (external format parse) -> protocol_key; compgen bash one-liner and 'Get-Command ... Select-Object' are shell command strings executed by the shell, not UI -> protocol_key; shell_detail() doc says 'How to present this data to the user for error messages' and flows into shell_terminated_banner UI, so 'Docker sandbox ({image})' / 'Docker sandbox' -> translate (Docker brand kept, {image} preserved, full-width parens around Chinese-adjacent code identifier).
